hint.voiceRuntime: Voice presets apply to your Node-RED runtime OS (Linux vs macOS), not necessarily the machine running this editor.

help.intro: Speaks text from the node's Text or Name field, or from msg.payload when those are empty.
help.macos: macOS — uses the built-in say command; no extra setup on a default install.
help.linux: Linux — install Festival (for example apt install festival) and ensure audio output works.
help.linuxEngine: On Linux, only Festival is supported by the npm say package; engines such as espeak-ng are not used.
help.windows: Windows — uses PowerShell SAPI; works on standard Windows with PowerShell.
help.macosVoices: On macOS, list available voices on the runtime with: say -v ?
